name: Amaretto Fruit Dip
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Cool Whip - thawed in refrigerat
3 3/8 oz Lemon Jello Instant Pudding/Pie Filling
recipeInstructions:
1. Gently whisk together sour cream and amaretto in a medium sized bowl.
2. Stir in instant pudding mix.
3. Gently but thoroughly stir in Cool Whip.
4. Cover and refrigerate several hours or overnight to combine flavors.
5. Serve with sliced fresh fruit.
